response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match with 15+ years of full-stack experience, deep TypeScript/Node.js/React proficiency, and directly relevant AI agent infrastructure work at his current role including MCP framework contributions. His testing discipline is exceptional — he has built open-source testing libraries and run TDD workshops, which exceeds the testing expertise requirement. The primary gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js experience despite it being the core backend framework, no mention of Python (listed as required), and Kotlin implied only through Java — all learnable gaps for a senior engineer with his track record.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience with direct alignment to the primary stack across multiple production environments
Active AI agent and MCP framework development at current role — directly matches the AI agent development requirement and is rare at this level
Exceptional testing culture: TDD practitioner, built open-source D testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and delivered multi-day TDD/testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being the primary backend framework in the stack
Python is absent from the skills list and work history, yet is listed as a required proficiency in the job description
Kotlin not explicitly mentioned; Java experience exists from older roles but the secondary backend stack preference is Kotlin

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP framework hands-on experience
